name: ops-hub
description: Set up and operate a client-centric Notion operations hub: clients, projects, tasks, and pipeline, with living context pages on each client and project. A setup web app shapes the hub to your team; the skills (hub-setup, client-write/update, project-write/update, tasks-write) read a Notion config page plus live schema introspection before every write, find structural fields by role so they survive renames, and always confirm before changing anything. Not a CRM: a broader operations hub.
